scope.request: Structured Synthesis only from the provided local Feed Items fixture; local self-verification; no Briefing Page, no Show Script, no live FeedContext API.
scope.selection_rule: Grouped the three fixture Feed Items into exactly two Artifact Topics by workflow role: local artifact structure and gated audio/eval behavior.

units.title: Local artifact generation stays repeatable and boundary-safe
units.claim: The fixture supports a base output structure where reviewed Structured Synthesis drives later local artifacts while avoiding FeedContext API calls or product-repository ownership of rendering.

supporting_evidence.title: Local renderers make briefing pages repeatable
supporting_evidence.reason: States that local helper renderers turn reviewed Structured Synthesis into repeatable artifacts and should not call the FeedContext API.

supporting_evidence.title: Behavior evals should replay independent agent runs
supporting_evidence.reason: Connects independent agent runs to traceable artifacts, matching the eval requirement for local output files.

units.selection_rationale: This is the lead Artifact Topic because the eval asks for shared base output files and explicitly excludes live API access and final rendering.

units.title: Ordered review gates protect downstream audio and artifact work
units.claim: The fixture reinforces that Structured Synthesis and review are the base gates before Show Script, segment manifests, audio rendering, or final artifact work.

supporting_evidence.title: Audio Briefs move through script and segment manifests
supporting_evidence.reason: Lists the required order from Structured Synthesis through review, Show Script, segment manifest, provider rendering, assembly, and Final Audio Review.

supporting_evidence.title: Behavior evals should replay independent agent runs
supporting_evidence.reason: Frames the acceptance signal as a fresh agent run graded against the expected output contract.

units.selection_rationale: This Artifact Topic is included because the prompt scopes the run to Structured Synthesis only, making the review gate the final allowed stage.

secondary_items.title: Behavior evals should replay independent agent runs
secondary_items.reason: Useful as eval-process context, but it supports both topics rather than forming a separate third Artifact Topic.
